field.label: Enable RPZ
field.help: Enable Response Policy Zone support. The zone file must exist at /usr/local/etc/namedb/primary/<zone>.db before applying.

field.label: Zone Name
field.help: Name of the RPZ zone (e.g. rpz.local). The zone file is expected at /usr/local/etc/namedb/primary/<zone>.db.

field.label: Policy
field.help: Override policy applied to names matching the RPZ zone. Leave empty to use the zone's own CNAME records (given).

field.label: Break DNSSEC
field.help: Allow RPZ to rewrite DNSSEC-signed responses. Required when using NXDOMAIN or NODATA policy with DNSSEC-validating clients.
